metadata.name: ruff-lsp
classifiers: Topic :: Software Development :: Libraries :: Python Modules
metadata.summary: A Language Server Protocol implementation for Ruff.

modules.name: ruff_lsp.utils
documentation: Utility functions and classes for use with running tools over LSP.

documentation: Ensures we always get a list

documentation: This is the extensions folder under ~/.vscode or ~/.vscode-server.

documentation: Returns true if two paths are the same.

documentation: Returns true if the executable path is same as the current interpreter.

documentation: Returns the absolute path to an interpreter's scripts directory.

documentation: Returns the version of the executable at the given path.

documentation: The log level for the Ruff server. Defaults to "error".

documentation: Settings specific to format capabilities.

modules.name: ruff_lsp.server
documentation: Implementation of the LSP server for Ruff.

functions.name: ruff_lsp.server._uri_to_fs_path
documentation: Convert a URI to a file system path.
Document

functions.name: ruff_lsp.server._create_notebook_json
documentation: Create a JSON representation of the given Notebook Document.

functions.name: ruff_lsp.server._create_single_cell_notebook_json
documentation:
Create a JSON representation of a single cell Notebook Document containing
the given source.

functions.name: ruff_lsp.server.did_open
documentation: LSP handler for textDocument/didOpen request.
Linting.

functions.name: ruff_lsp.server.did_close
documentation: LSP handler for textDocument/didClose request.

functions.name: ruff_lsp.server.did_save
documentation: LSP handler for textDocument/didSave request.

functions.name: ruff_lsp.server.did_change
documentation: LSP handler for textDocument/didChange request.

functions.name: ruff_lsp.server.did_open_notebook
documentation: LSP handler for notebookDocument/didOpen request.

functions.name: ruff_lsp.server.did_close_notebook
documentation: LSP handler for notebookDocument/didClose request.

functions.name: ruff_lsp.server.did_save_notebook
documentation: LSP handler for notebookDocument/didSave request.

functions.name: ruff_lsp.server.did_change_notebook
documentation: LSP handler for notebookDocument/didChange request.

functions.name: ruff_lsp.server._group_diagnostics_by_cell
documentation:
Group diagnostics by cell index.

The function will return a mapping from cell number to a list of diagnostics for
that cell. The mapping will be empty if the diagnostic doesn't contain the cell
information.

functions.name: ruff_lsp.server._did_change_or_save_notebook
documentation: Handle notebookDocument/didChange and notebookDocument/didSave requests.

functions.name: ruff_lsp.server._parse_fix
documentation: Parse the fix from the Ruff output.

functions.name: ruff_lsp.server._parse_output
documentation: Parse Ruff's JSON output.

functions.name: ruff_lsp.server.hover
documentation:
LSP handler for textDocument/hover request.

This works for both Python files and Notebook Documents. For Notebook Documents,
the hover works at the cell level.

functions.name: ruff_lsp.server.code_action
documentation:
LSP handler for textDocument/codeAction request.

Code actions work at a text document level which is either a Python file or a
cell in a Notebook document. The function will try to get the Notebook cell
first, and if there's no cell with the given URI, it will fallback to the text
document.

functions.name: ruff_lsp.server.resolve_code_action
documentation: LSP handler for codeAction/resolve request.

functions.name: ruff_lsp.server._result_to_workspace_edit
documentation: Converts a run result to a WorkspaceEdit.

functions.name: ruff_lsp.server._result_single_cell_notebook_to_edits
documentation:
Converts a run result to a list of TextEdits.

The result is expected to be a single cell Notebook Document.

functions.name: ruff_lsp.server._fixed_source_to_edits
documentation:
Converts the fixed source to a list of TextEdits.

If the fixed source is a list of strings, it is joined together to form a single
string with an assumption that the line endings are part of the strings itself.

functions.name: ruff_lsp.server._get_line_endings
documentation: Returns line endings used in the text.

functions.name: ruff_lsp.server._match_line_endings
documentation: Ensures that the edited text line endings matches the document line endings.

functions.name: ruff_lsp.server.run_path
documentation: Runs as an executable.

functions.name: ruff_lsp.server.initialize
documentation: LSP handler for initialize request.
Lifecycle.

functions.name: ruff_lsp.server._supports_code_action_resolve
documentation: Returns True if the client supports codeAction/resolve request for edits.

functions.name: ruff_lsp.server._get_global_defaults
documentation: Settings.

functions.name: ruff_lsp.server._find_ruff_binary
documentation:
Returns the executable along with its version.

If the executable doesn't meet the version requirement, raises a RuntimeError and
displays an error message.

functions.name: ruff_lsp.server._find_ruff_binary_path
documentation: Returns the path to the executable.

functions.name: ruff_lsp.server._executable_version
documentation: Returns the version of the executable.

functions.name: ruff_lsp.server._run_check_on_document
documentation: Runs the Ruff `check` subcommand  on the given document source.

functions.name: ruff_lsp.server._run_format_on_document
documentation: Runs the Ruff `format` subcommand on the given document source.

functions.name: ruff_lsp.server._run_subcommand_on_document
documentation: Runs the tool subcommand on the given document.

functions.name: ruff_lsp.server.log_to_output
documentation: Logging.

functions.name: ruff_lsp.server.show_error
documentation: Show a pop-up with an error. Only use for critical errors.

functions.name: ruff_lsp.server.set_bundle
documentation: Sets the path to the bundled Ruff executable.

functions.name: ruff_lsp.server.get_bundle
documentation: Returns the path to the bundled Ruff executable.

functions.name: ruff_lsp.server.start
documentation: Start up.

documentation: Last modified of the executable

classes.name: ruff_lsp.server.DocumentKind

class_variables.name: ruff_lsp.server.DocumentKind.Text
documentation: A Python file.

class_variables.name: ruff_lsp.server.DocumentKind.Notebook
documentation: A Notebook Document.

class_variables.name: ruff_lsp.server.DocumentKind.Cell

The kind of document.

classes.name: ruff_lsp.server.Document

methods.name: ruff_lsp.server.Document.from_text_document
documentation: Create a `Document` from the given Text Document.

methods.name: ruff_lsp.server.Document.from_notebook_document
documentation: Create a `Document` from the given Notebook Document.

methods.name: ruff_lsp.server.Document.from_notebook_cell
documentation: Create a `Document` from the given Notebook cell.

methods.name: ruff_lsp.server.Document.from_cell_or_text_uri
documentation:
Create a `Document` representing either a Python file or a Notebook cell from
the given URI.

The function will try to get the Notebook cell first, and if there's no cell
with the given URI, it will fallback to the text document.

methods.name: ruff_lsp.server.Document.from_uri
documentation:
Create a `Document` representing either a Python file or a Notebook from
the given URI.

The URI can be a file URI, a notebook URI, or a cell URI. The function will
try to get the notebook document first, and if there's no notebook document
with the given URI, it will fallback to the text document.

methods.name: ruff_lsp.server.Document.is_stdlib_file
documentation: Return True if the document belongs to standard library.
A document representing either a Python file, a Notebook cell, or a Notebook.

classes.name: ruff_lsp.server.MarkdownCell

classes.name: ruff_lsp.server.Notebook

classes.name: ruff_lsp.server.TextDocument

classes.name: ruff_lsp.server.Fix

classes.name: ruff_lsp.server.LegacyFix
documentation:
A fix for a diagnostic, represented as a single edit.

Matches Ruff's output prior to v0.0.260.
